title: andrachne pumila
intro: Andrachne pumila, also known as the dwarf Andrachne, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to various parts of Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other health issues. The leaves and roots of the Andrachne pumila plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to benefit from its medicinal properties.
